title: tylanthus excelsus
intro: Tylanthus excelsus, also known as Bitter Melon or Bitter Gourd, is a type of tropical and annual vine plant that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood sugar levels and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tylanthus excelsus include its potential to aid in weight loss, reduce the risk of diabetes, and improve cardiovascular health. Tylanthus excelsus can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or juices for consumption, and is also used in traditional Indian and Chinese medicine preparations.
